name: Location Word Patterns — 店馆场院站

cards.grammarNote: Chinese location names are built from recognizable suffixes. Learn the suffix and you can guess what a new place is — 咖啡店 (coffee shop), 图书馆 (library), 机场 (airport). These suffixes carry consistent meaning across hundreds of place names.
店 = shop or store. Attaches to a product or service: 咖啡店 (coffee shop), 书店 (bookstore), 药店 (pharmacy), 花店 (flower shop), 面包店 (bakery). If you see 店, it sells something.
咖啡 (coffee) + 店 (shop) = coffee shop. The product always comes first, then 店.
书 (book) + 店 = bookstore. Same pattern: 玩具店 (toy store), 服装店 (clothing store).
馆 = a public hall or cultural/service establishment. 图书馆 (library), 博物馆 (museum), 饭馆 (restaurant), 体育馆 (gym/stadium). 馆 implies a more formal, often public or cultural space than 店.
图书 (books/documents) + 馆 = library. 图书 is a formal word for books — more so than just 书.
博物 (broad knowledge of things) + 馆 = museum. 博 = broad/erudite, 物 = things/objects.
饭 (cooked rice / food) + 馆 = restaurant. 饭馆 is informal; 餐厅 (cāntīng) is more formal. Both are common.
场 = open ground or large functional area. 机场 (airport), 广场 (plaza), 停车场 (parking lot), 操场 (sports field/playground). 场 suggests an outdoor or large-scale space.
机 (machine / plane, short for 飞机) + 场 (field) = airport. 飞机 = airplane; 机场 = airplane field.
广 (broad/wide) + 场 = broad open space = plaza or square.
院 = institution, often formal or official. 医院 (hospital), 电影院 (cinema), 法院 (court), 学院 (college/academy). 院 carries a sense of an enclosed, organized institution.
医 (medicine / healing) + 院 (institution) = hospital. 医生 (doctor) shares the same 医 character.
电影 (movie) + 院 (hall/institution) = cinema. 电影 = electric shadow (a poetic original term for film).
站 = a stopping/transit point. 火车站 (train station), 公交站 (bus stop), 地铁站 (subway station), 加油站 (gas station). If you need to catch transportation, look for 站.
火车 (train, lit: fire vehicle) + 站 (station) = train station. 火 = fire, 车 = vehicle.
地铁 (subway, lit: underground iron) + 站 = subway station. 地 = ground/earth, 铁 = iron/metal.

cards.front: What kind of place is a 大学图书馆?
cards.grammarNote: 大学 (university) + 图书 (books) + 馆 (hall) = university library. Once you know these suffixes, you can decode unfamiliar place names by recognizing the suffix.
